Are you inspired by building a pioneering EdTech company that will empower millions of people? Do you dream of creating cutting-edge web applications that seamlessly combine AI, UX/UI excellence, and scalability to create transformative learning experiences at scale ?

title: Full-Stack Engineer (Web & APIs)
description:
At The Flex, we believe renting a home should feel instant, intelligent, and effortless — as seamless as booking a ride.

Our ambition is bold: enabling anyone to live anywhere, anytime, without friction.

Powered by , our proprietary automation engine, we are building the operating system for modern renting — connecting property data, orchestrating operations, and enabling seamless stays across continents.

If you’re energized by , this is your opportunity to shape how millions of people move, live, and experience the world.

💡 What You’ll Build

As a , you will design, build, and scale the core web applications and APIs behind The Flex platform — powering instant bookings, intelligent access, automated workflows, and predictive operations.

You will work end-to-end across , turning complex operational challenges into clean, scalable, API-first systems.

You won’t just ship features.

You’ll create leverage, unlock automation, and architect the foundation of an intelligent, global rental ecosystem.

⚙️ Your Mission



Develop fast, reliable, and scalable web applications and APIs that power bookings, payments, availability, and guest experiences.



Architect robust, well-documented APIs that connect Base360.ai to internal tools and external partners.



Build event-driven services and automated workflows that eliminate manual operations across the business.



Deliver high-impact integrations with partners such as Airbnb, Stripe, Hostaway, and Twilio.



Ship and maintain serverless infrastructure on AWS, optimized for speed, resilience, and global scale.



Tackle real-time booking synchronization, pricing intelligence, keyless access logic, AI-powered alerts, and live operational dashboards.



Collaborate closely with product, data, and operations teams to turn ideas into measurable, real-world impact.

🧠 You’re a Great Fit If You Have



🌍 Why You’ll Love Working Here



Your work will power thousands of stays and help redefine a multi-trillion-pound industry.



Minimal bureaucracy, high trust, and the chance to build foundational systems from day one.



Fast iteration, continuous learning, and a culture that values technical excellence.



Competitive compensation with meaningful upside for exceptional contributors.



Work from anywhere — we measure outcomes, not hours.

🚫 This Role Is Not for You If

title: Java Full Stack Engineer FS
description:
Yassir is the leading super App in the Maghreb region set to changing the way daily services are provided. It currently operates in 45 cities across Algeria, Morocco and Tunisia with recent expansions into France, Canada and Sub-Saharan Africa. It is backed (:$200M in funding) by VCs from Silicon Valley, Europe and other parts of the world.

We offer on-demand services such as ride-hailing and last-mile delivery. Building on this infrastructure, we are now introducing financial services to help our users pay, save and borrow digitally.

Helping usher the continent into a digital economy era. We’re not just about serving people - we’re about creating a marketplace to bring people what they need while infusing social values.
















At Yassir, we believe in the power of diversity and the importance of an inclusive culture. So, if you're ready to bring your unique perspective and experiences to the table, then we're excited to listen.

Don't just apply for a job, come and be a part of our journey. Let's create a better tomorrow together.

We look forward to receiving your application!

Best of luck,

Your Yassir TA Team

title: Développeur Full Stack Senior
description:
À propos de l’entreprise

Atlas Energies est une scale-up en hypercroissance qui opère au cœur des piliers de la société moderne : l’énergie, la technologie et la performance.

Portée par une croissance à trois chiffres, notre ambition est claire : transformer durablement la manière dont les entreprises consomment et pilotent leur énergie.

Chaque jour, nous accompagnons PME, ETI et grands comptes pour mieux acheter, mieux consommer et mieux gérer leur énergie, en combinant expertise métier, technologie et excellence humaine.



Tu rejoins Atlas Energies pour jouer un rôle clé dans notre phase de croissance : industrialiser, automatiser et digitaliser les processus métiers afin de garantir performance, fiabilité et scalabilité sur le long terme. En tant que développeur full stack senior, ton rôle dépasse le code : tu conçois des architectures solides, automatises des flux complexes, connectes des outils et structures la data pour accompagner une croissance rapide et durable.











Ici, ton travail a un vrai impact, tu construis des systèmes au cœur du business, avec une forte autonomie, des responsabilités qui évoluent vite et une trajectoire claire vers des rôles techniques clés. Tu rejoins une équipe ambitieuse, un projet en pleine croissance, des bureaux vivants et pleins d’ambiance.

title: Développeur Full Stack Senior
description:
Dans le cadre de notre croissance, nous recrutons un Développeur Senior Full Stack Spring Boot / Angular, au sein d’une équipe pluridisciplinaire fonctionnant en mode Agile. Vous serez garant(e) de la qualité, de la performance et de la vélocité des développements de notre solution.

Une expérience sur des architectures est indispensable.



🔹 Contribuer à l’analyse des besoins et au choix des solutions techniques

🔹 Participer aux phases de chiffrage et d’estimation

🔹 Concevoir et développer des fonctionnalités de bout en bout (front-end et back-end)

🔹 Garantir la performance, la maintenabilité et la sécurité des applications

🔹 Être un acteur de la montée en compétence de l’équipe et les accompagner sur les sujets structurants et complexes

🔹 Garantir la qualité du code et de la documentation technique

🔹 Participer aux étapes de revue de code et le bon déploiement des composants applicatifs

🔹 Garantir le bon fonctionnement nominal des user stories développées





Java 17+, Angular 15+, Spring Boot 3+, MongoDB, SonarQube



Axon, Camunda, Kafka, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, Docker, Kubernetes (K8s), GitLab CI, CQRS / Event Sourcing



Agile, TDD, API-First, DDD





✔ Diplôme d’Ingénieur en développement logiciel

✔ Minimum 5 ans d’expérience en tant que développeur confirmé ou senior

✔ Forte appétence pour les architectures et technologies modernes

✔ Envie de s’investir dans la construction d’un progiciel de type place de marché



✨ Participation à la construction d’un progiciel innovant

✨ Mode de travail hybride

We are looking for solution focused individuals with a can-do attitude. Your commitment to continuous learning means you are tech agnostic – always looking for the best way to execute a project or task. title: Senior Backend Engineer, Node.js + AWS
description:
Who We Are Is What We Do.

Deel is the all-in-one payroll and HR platform for global teams. Our vision is to unlock global opportunity for every person, team, and business. Built for the way the world works today, Deel combines HRIS, payroll, compliance, benefits, performance, and equipment management into one seamless platform. With AI-powered tools and a fully owned payroll infrastructure, Deel supports every worker type in 150+ countries—helping businesses scale smarter, faster, and more compliantly.

Among the largest globally distributed companies in the world, our team of 7,000 spans more than 100 countries, speaks 74 languages, and brings a connected and dynamic culture that drives continuous learning and innovation for our customers.



As the fastest-growing Software as a Service (SaaS) company in history, Deel is transforming how global talent connects with world-class companies – breaking down borders that have traditionally limited both hiring and career opportunities. We're not just building software; we're creating the infrastructure for the future of work, enabling a more diverse and inclusive global economy. In 2024 alone, we paid $11.2 billion to workers in nearly 100 currencies and provided healthcare and benefits to workers in 109 countries—ensuring people get paid and protected, no matter where they are.

Our momentum is reflected in our achievements and customer satisfaction: CNBC Disruptor 50, Forbes Cloud 100, Deloitte Fast 500, and repeated recognition on Y Combinator’s top companies list – all while maintaining a 4.83 average rating from 15,000 reviews across G2, Trustpilot, Captera, Apple and Google.

Your experience at Deel will be a career accelerator. At the forefront of the global work revolution, you'll tackle complex challenges that impact millions of people's working lives. With our momentum—backed by a $17.3 billion valuation and $1 B in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) in just over five years—you'll drive meaningful impact while building expertise that makes you a sought-after leader in the transformation of global work.



















Our workforce deserves fair and competitive pay that meets them where they are. With scalable benefits, rewards, and perks, our total rewards programs reflect our commitment to inclusivity and access for all.

title: Lead Full-Stack Engineer
description:
oin the team redefining the future of global living.

At The Flex, we believe renting a home should feel instant, intelligent, and effortless — as seamless as booking a ride.

Our ambition is bold: enabling anyone to live anywhere, anytime, without friction.

Powered by Base360.ai, our proprietary automation engine, we’re building the operating system for modern renting — connecting property data, orchestrating operations, and enabling seamless stays across continents.

If you’re driven by technical ownership, system architecture, and building platforms that operate at real-world scale, this role puts you at the center of how millions of people move, live, and experience the world.

💡 What You’ll Build

As a Lead Full-Stack Engineer, you will own the architecture and technical direction of The Flex platform — spanning web applications, APIs, automation engines, and cloud infrastructure.

You’ll lead by building.

You’ll design systems, set standards, and make key technical decisions while remaining deeply hands-on across the stack.

This is not a people-management role.

It’s a technical leadership role for someone who wants to shape systems, mentor by example, and build platforms that scale globally.

⚙️ Your Mission

Own the Architecture

Define and evolve the technical architecture powering bookings, payments, availability, pricing, and guest experience.

Lead by Building

Deliver critical features end-to-end across frontend, backend, and infrastructure — setting the bar for quality and speed.

Design API-First Platforms

Architect scalable, well-structured APIs that connect Base360.ai to internal tools and external partners.

Automate the Business

Build event-driven services and intelligent workflows that replace manual operations across the company.

Integrate at Scale

Own and evolve deep integrations with platforms such as Airbnb, Stripe, Hostaway, and Twilio.

Ship with Confidence

Deploy and operate serverless infrastructure on AWS, ensuring reliability, security, and global performance.

Solve the Hard Stuff

Lead solutions for real-time booking sync, pricing intelligence, keyless access logic, AI-powered alerts, and live operational dashboards.

Raise the Bar

Establish best practices, review critical code, and mentor engineers through example and technical clarity.

🧠 You’re a Great Fit If You Have

Strong senior-level experience with Node.js, React, and AWS (serverless)
Proven ownership of system architecture and complex distributed systems
Deep experience designing and scaling API-first platforms
Experience with Python / FastAPI for automation or data services (bonus)
A history of building production-grade systems used at real scale
High standards for code quality, reliability, and performance
A builder’s mindset — you execute fast, think long-term, and enjoy responsibility

🌍 Why You’ll Love Working Here

Architect Real Impact

Your decisions will shape a platform used across cities and continents.

High Ownership, No Politics

Small, elite team with real autonomy and zero corporate drag.

Build From First Principles

You’ll help define not just features, but the foundation of the company’s technology.

Performance-Based Rewards

Top-of-market compensation with meaningful upside for exceptional leaders.

Remote-First

Work from anywhere — we care about leverage and outcomes, not hours.

🚫 This Role Is Not for You If

You want a management-heavy role with little hands-on work
You avoid making hard technical decisions
You’re uncomfortable owning systems end-to-end
“Good enough” is acceptable to you

title: Senior Frontend Engineer (Complex Data & Dashboards)
description:
We are one of the leading technology groups in Italy. We operate as a Business & Technology Accelerator for companies, financial institutions, and public sector organizations, supporting the evolution of their IT and digital strategies. Through an ecosystem of companies that share values, business strategies, and a common vision, we enable our clients to unlock the full potential of technology, amplifying its positive impact on both the economy and society.

What To Expect

We are looking for a Frontend Architect, not a graphic designer. We need the bridge between complex industrial data and human understanding. If you prefer building logic-heavy dashboards with 10,000-row tables over coding simple landing pages, this role is for you. You will own the client-side architecture and define how our users visualize their financial and operational reality.

As our Senior Frontend Engineer, you will report to the Head of Engineering and lead the UI implementation for our core platform. You will be the guardian of our Design System, ensuring we use professional UI Kits (like Tailwind UI or Ant Design) rather than wasting time reinventing the wheel. Your goal is to build high-performance interfaces that visualize heavy data without lagging.

What You Will Do

You will maintain our library of reusable UI components. You will reject “custom styles” in code reviews to enforce consistency and velocity.
You will choose and manage the technical stack (React/Vue and State Management patterns) to ensure the application remains maintainable as it scales.
You will use libraries like Canvas or D3.js to build difficult data visualizations that represent inventory levels or financial forecasts.
You are responsible for load times and rendering speed. You must ensure the app handles large datasets (e.g., massive tables) without freezing.
You will connect the UI to Backend endpoints, handling loading states and errors gracefully.

What We Expect From You

5+ years of experience in frontend development.
You must be comfortable handling “heavy” applications (dashboards, tables, graphs), not just static websites.
Expert proficiency in Modern JavaScript Frameworks (React or Vue) and State Management (Redux, Pinia, or Context).
Experience with libraries like D3.js, Chart.js, or Canvas.
Proficiency with tools like Tailwind or Bootstrap.
You understand the backend enough to discuss API contracts efficiently with the API team.
Experience implementing existing professional UI Kits (e.g., Tailwind UI) instead of drawing icons from scratch.

title: Golang Full Stack Developer
description:
We are one of the leading technology groups in Italy. We operate as a Business & Technology Accelerator for companies, financial institutions, and public sector organizations, supporting the evolution of their IT and digital strategies. Through an ecosystem of companies that share values, business strategies, and a common vision, we enable our clients to unlock the full potential of technology, amplifying its positive impact on both the economy and society.

What To Expect

We are a leading cyber security consultancy and Continuous Controls Monitoring (CCM) provider dedicated to helping organisations protect their digital assets and infrastructure. Our innovative solutions, expert consultancy and bespoke CCM services are designed to meet the unique security needs of businesses across various industries.

The role provides a fundamental part of the Quod Orbis team.

As a Developer at our company, you will be involved in the full software development lifecycle, from concept and design to testing and deployment. You will work closely with our team of developers, product managers, and cyber security experts to create high-quality, scalable, and secure SaaS solutions. The Developer will have a strong background in software development, with a passion for technology and a keen interest in cyber security.

What You Will Do

Drive the technical implementation of the move from single-tenant to multi-tenant architecture.
Work closely with the Head of Platform to plan, design, and execute the migration strategy.
Develop tenant-aware backend services and APIs in Go.
Support data migration, including schema changes, backfills, and transition from existing environments.
Implement and test tenant isolation, access control, and configuration management.
Update frontend components and routing to support tenant context where needed.
Improve database performance, partitioning, and query efficiency for multi-tenant systems.
Enhance observability, logging, and monitoring with tenant-level visibility.
Collaborate with DevOps to achieve zero-downtime releases and safe rollouts.
Mentor backend developers and promote best practices across the team (SAST/DAST).

What We Expect From You

Contact with others (face-to-face, by telephone or otherwise, including visits to other sites)
Attention to detail and a high level of accuracy
6+ years of backend development experience.
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field. A Master’s degree or relevant certifications are a desirable but not mandatory.
Strong Go development experience, ideally in distributed or high-scale systems.
Solid frontend experience.
Proven experience with multi-tenant system design or migration projects.
Deep understanding of tenancy models; database per tenant, schema per tenant, or shared schema and the trade-offs of each.
Skilled in data modelling, schema partitioning, and tenant-aware querying.
Experience implementing tenant-based authentication, authorisation, and RBAC.
Experience in migrating legacy applications or environments into shared, multi-tenant platforms.
Comfortable working with relational databases (PostgreSQL, MariaDB, or MySQL).
Strong collaboration and communication skills — able to partner with backend, frontend, and DevOps teams effectively.

What We Offer You

A leadership role at the helm of a dynamic and innovative cyber security SaaS company.
The opportunity to shape the future of cyber security through cutting-edge technology and services.
Competitive compensation package.
A collaborative and supportive culture that values innovation, integrity, and inclusivity

title: Senior Full Stack Java Developer

Vneuron is a leading RegTech company at the forefront of transforming financial crime compliance. Our advanced solution, Reis RCS, streamlines risk management, enhances AML and sanctions screening, and ensures regulatory compliance through real-time monitoring, AI-powered risk detection, and seamless case management.

In 2025, Vneuron earned recognition as one of the Top Innovators in the FinCrimeTech50, was awarded Best Compliance as a Service Solution award at the RegTech Insight Awards Europe, and was named to the AIFinTech100 2025 list. For the fourth consecutive year, we’ve been honored in the RegTech100, a global list of the most innovative companies in the industry.

At Vneuron, we’re shaping the future of compliance and financial crime prevention. Join us in making a real impact in the world of RegTech.

Our Culture & Values

Vneuron puts the development of its team at the heart of its priorities. We provide a pleasant and comfortable work environment. Our organizational structure is flat and collaborative, and our management is available and present.

We invite you to be part of a passionate and committed young team who values respect and sharing spirit. You will be surrounded by highly skilled technical and functional experts willing to guide you to evolve in all aspects of your career.

We believe that every person is unique and special. Thus, we provide attentive and active listening to your ideas and propositions as we believe that you will have an essential role in achieving our next milestone and shaping the future of Vneurons value proposition.

Design and develop new software functionalities (research, design, architecture, integration)

Strong problem-solving skills and ability to handle complex technical challenges
Excellent command of algorithms, data structures, and software architecture
Strong expertise in Spring Boot, Spring Batch, Spring Integration, Spring Security, Hibernate/JPA, and Angular

Apply Now and become the next Spark!

Follow us on LinkedIn to learn more about the Spark team and our Spark solutions.

We would be delighted to meet you and give you much more information!

Votre rôle au sein de cette équipe :
Développement : Vous participerez au développement de nouvelles fonctionnalités, à la maintenance de l’application et à l’amélioration continue de l’architecture front afin de garantir une expérience utilisateur optimale. En collaboration avec l’ensemble de l’équipe Front, juniors comme seniors, vous contribuerez également à faire évoluer le code existant pour en augmenter la qualité, la testabilité et la performance, en cohérence avec les requirements Back.
Participation à la Communauté : Chez Oodrive on a des Communautés de Pratiques qui réunissent les passionnés autour de certaines thématiques transverses. On a également mis en place des Coding Dojos (Workshops internes avec des experts) et des R&Days (Conférences sur des sujets techniques qui animent la communauté). En participant à ces initiatives, vous deviendrez un acteur de votre progression et de celle de la communauté.
Interactions en interne : Vous échangez avec l’équipe produit pour prioriser les développements, avec l’équipe Back pour travailler autour des APIs, les QA pour développer et optimiser les tests ainsi qu’avec les autres équipes Front pour partager autour des améliorations, des bonnes pratiques et des dernières technos.

Méthodes et outils :
Angular, Gitlab, Matrix, JIRA, Confluence.

Comment vous ferez la différence :

Expertise technique :
Vous avez une forte expérience avec Angular ( 6 ans et plus ).
Vous avez une expérience solide avec les design systems, les librairies partagées Angular, et les architectures modulaires.
Vous appliquez les bonnes pratiques de Clean Architecture et vous savez structurer un front complexe de manière pérenne.
Vous maîtrisez les tests unitaires et intégration côté front.

Legacy : Autonome et rigoureux·se, avec une excellente capacité d’analyse, vous savez intervenir sur une codebase existante, l’améliorer progressivement et la moderniser lorsque cela a du sens.
Agilité : Dans nos équipes, on est dans une démarche de développement et de professionnalisation de nos pratiques agiles. Vous êtes sensible à ces approches et force de proposition pour améliorer les processus, les rituels et la qualité globale du delivery.

Nos avantages :
Avantages sociaux : Carte repas, Primes, Assurance maladie,
Conventions : Banque, salle de sport et agence de voyage.
Flexibilité : Planning hybride après la validation de la période d'essai.
Congés payés : Maladie, Maternité et d'autres offerts par la société

Notre process de recrutement :
Echange RH dans nos locaux
Echange technique & pair programming avec l'équipe

title: Senior Backend Engineer (Security & FinTech)
description:
We are one of the leading technology groups in Italy. We operate as a Business & Technology Accelerator for companies, financial institutions, and public sector organizations, supporting the evolution of their IT and digital strategies. Through an ecosystem of companies that share values, business strategies, and a common vision, we enable our clients to unlock the full potential of technology, amplifying its positive impact on both the economy and society.

What To Expect

We are looking for a “Security Champion” to join our Product Engineering team. If you are a “FinTech Survivor” who loves strict code reviews and “Zero Trust” environments but is tired of the slow pace of traditional banking, this role is for you. You won’t just be patching vulnerabilities; you will design the secure architecture that protects our customers’ most sensitive financial data.

As a Senior Backend Engineer, you will act as the “Anchor” for our FinTech domain. You will own the server-side logic with a specific mandate: ensure our system is secure by design. You will build the “secure pipes” that deliver data to our AI models, ensuring compliance with federal audits (SOC2, GLBA) without slowing down innovation.

What You Will Do

You will design systems where no component trusts another by default, defining strict encryption standards (at rest/in transit) and enforcing data segregation between tenants.
You will write code that mitigates OWASP Top 10 risks (SQLi, XSS) by design, rather than fixing them after the fact.
You will implement robust Authentication and fine-grained Authorization mechanisms using protocols like OAuth2, OIDC, and RBAC/ABAC.
You are responsible for building immutable logging systems where every API call and database access is traced and searchable to satisfy federal audits.
You will build data anonymization pipelines that strip PII from banking data before it reaches our Data Scientists, ensuring they can work safely.
You will proactively update dependencies and refactor code based on security scanning results (SAST/DAST).

What We Expect From You

5+ years of experience in backend development.
A strong track record in regulated industries (FinTech, HealthTech, Insurance) or cybersecurity engineering.
Proficiency in designing Microservices, Event-Driven architectures, or Modular Monoliths.
Expert skills in API Design (REST, GraphQL, gRPC) and Testing Frameworks.
Deep knowledge of Application Security (OWASP Top 10), Cryptography standards, and Identity Protocols (OAuth2, OIDC, SAML).
Someone used to strict code reviews and handling PII, but looking for a faster startup environment.
A developer who naturally gravitates towards security tickets and always spots the XSS vulnerability in code reviews.
Experience building audit trails for SOC2 or GDPR.

title: Développeur Full stack Symfony Angular
company: CBTW IT & Technology / Positive Thinking Company
description:
Chez Collaboration Betters The World, entreprise mondiale de conseil en technologie, la collaboration est la pierre angulaire de l’innovation et du succès, et le fondement de tout ce que nous mettons en œuvre.
Notre mission : transformer les entreprises et les communautés pour un monde meilleur.
Présents dans plus de 20 pays et 35 villes, nous allions une expertise mondiale avec une compréhension locale des enjeux de nos clients.
Au sein de la Service Line "Software Engineering", nous fournissons des solutions innovantes conçues pour répondre à des besoins en constante évolution. Nous sommes spécialisés dans les solutions Web et Mobiles, Entreprise et E-Commerce, DevOps et Test. Ces pratiques se concentrent sur les produits et permettent d’accélérer leurs commercialisations sur le marché ainsi que la croissance de nos clients.

En tant que Développeur Full stack Symfony Angular, tu contribueras à la maintenance, au support et à l’évolution d’une application web.

Client
Notre client est un acteur majeur dans la fabrication, la distribution et la vente au détail d’articles de luxe.

Mission :
L’application web gère le suivi des demandes de travaux dans les points de vente. Tu seras chargé d’assurer son bon fonctionnement, ses mises à jour et son évolution, ainsi que le support aux utilisateurs.

Environnement technique :
Front-end: Angular 17
Back-end: PHP 7.x / 8.x, Symfony
Infrastructure : Docker (Linux), pipelines CI/CD GitLab
Déploiement : AWS
Authentification : Active Directory, Cognito, EntraID
Application : Multilingue (gestion des fichiers de traduction), accessible sur web, iOS et Android
Évolutions techniques : Montées de versions régulières des frameworks pour limiter la dette technique

Responsabilités
Maintenance corrective : Identifier et corriger les anomalies, réaliser les tests unitaires, d’intégration et de non-régression, documenter chaque modification (anomalie, travaux réalisés, tests, charge)
Maintenance préventive : Anticiper les impacts potentiels des correctifs, adapter l’application pour éviter tout dysfonctionnement, valider les correctifs via tests et déploiements
Support fonctionnel et technique : Assister les utilisateurs dans l’utilisation de l’application, accompagner sur le paramétrage et les interfaces, participer aux mises en production
Maintenance évolutive : Contribuer à l’évolution de l’application selon les besoins du client, améliorer l’ergonomie et les composants graphiques, mettre à jour les fichiers de traduction

Profil recherché
Formation : Bac +5 (Master, École d’ingénieur ou équivalent)
Expérience : Minimum 5 ans sur un poste similaire
Compétences techniques : Angular 17, PHP 7.x/8.x, Symfony, CI/CD GitLab, Docker sur Linux
Compétences appréciées : AWS, systèmes d’authentification AD, Cognito, EntraID, compétences UX/UI pour maintenance et amélioration des composants graphiques
Compétences personnelles : Autonomie, rigueur, capacité à documenter et communiquer efficacement
Langues : Français et anglais courant


Ce que nous te proposons :
Collaborer au sein d'une entreprise internationale dynamique et ouverte d'esprit où tes idées sont entendues et valorisées ;
Accéder à des perspectives d’évolution professionnelle tout au long de ta carrière via des formations et des certifications ;
Bénéficier d'un suivi de carrière sur mesure avec ton référent RH et des points réguliers avec ton Business Manager lors de tes missions ;
Intégrer des communautés te permettant de partager des centres d'intérêts communs ou expertises techniques ;
Créer du lien avec des collaborateurs passionnés à travers différents évènements internes (afterworks, soirées annuelles, séminaires, …).
